name: Dracula!Jonah Edmund Marshall
description:
Draculas are known for being one of the strongest types of vampires. Unlike others, Draculas are capable of manipulating minds and weather, as well as possessing magical powers. However, unlike vampires, Draculas cannot tolerate religious objects or sunlight.

There are no alternatives here!

Based on:The Mandela Catalogue
